case_title: LUNSKI & STIMPERT LLP VS. ITHINK GREEN PRINTING ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUNSKI & STIMPERT LLP

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-07-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-02-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PARTIES HAVE REACHED AN AGREEMENT BUT WANT TIME TO CONSUMATE THE DEAL BEFORE DISMISSING THE CLAIM", PER JUDGE MITCHEL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARCELO COSTAS WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY RON LUNSKI--LLP AND MORRE STIMPERT--LLP. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE REPRESENTED BY MARCELO COSTOS--COO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,813.45 FILED BY LUNSKI & STIMPERT LLP AS TO DEFENDANT ITHINK GREEN PRINTING COSTAS, MARCELO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED NOV-25-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ITHINK GREEN PRINTING
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ITHINK GREEN PRINTING COSTAS, MARCELO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BASED ON PROGRESS REPORT OF 1/7/15. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
